dialogues: Three different pictures. Take a look at each one. What do all three pictures show?

That's right. All three show 3 groups of 5. Bags, circles, graph symbols, different containers, same structure inside. That's what multiplication is. It describes the same pattern no matter how the groups look. 3 groups of 5 is always 3 × 5, whether it's bags on a shelf, dots in circles, or symbols on a graph.
